overall.description: A first-person exploration of a gothic cathedral interior in a video game. The player moves through the nave past wooden pews and NPCs in period clothing, approaches a raised altar with red drapery, and continues toward the back of the church. Warm candlelight and colorful stained glass windows illuminate the stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gothic cathedral nave with tall stone columns and warm candlelight. The camera moves forward between rows of wooden pews, passing an NPC in ornate red and gold robes standing in the aisle. Colorful stained glass windows cast colored light onto the stone floor as the camera approaches the altar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral altar area with raised platform and red drapery

events.description: circling around the altar platform to observe the area from different angles
turning away from the altar and moving toward the rear of the church

agents.ego_description: circling the altar area and observing the NPCs standing near the stained glass windows

notable_agents.action: figure in gray religious robes standing near the altar platform
woman in a long green medieval dress standing by the window

entered.detail: raised stone platform draped with red cloth and featuring steps
red carpet runner leading up to the altar steps
NPC wearing simple gray monk robes
NPC wearing a long green dress with white sleeves

segments.scene_description: The camera moves around the altar area, revealing a raised platform with red drapery and a carpeted approach. Two NPCs stand near the altar—one in gray robes and one in a green dress—while the camera circles to show different angles of the stained glass windows. The camera then turns and begins moving toward the back of the church.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear of cathedral with stairs leading to upper exit corridor

events.description: approaching the large wooden doors at the back of the church
ascending into a darker corridor with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the church and climbing the stone stairs to the upper exit corridor

notable_agents.action: figure in brown robes standing near the railing by the back doors

entered.detail: tall double wooden doors with iron hardware and arched tops at the back of the church
short flight of stone steps with side railings leading up to the exit
NPC in simple brown religious robes standing near the stairs
dimly lit stone corridor beyond the stairs with wooden doors on sides

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the back of the cathedral, passing the last rows of pews and approaching large wooden doors. An NPC in brown robes stands near the stone stairs leading up to a darker corridor. As the camera ascends the steps, the lighting dims significantly, transitioning from the bright nave to a shadowy upper hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luminous gothic cathedral that gradually transitions into a dim, shadowy corridor. It begins in the nave, gliding between rows of wooden pews past an NPC in ornate red and gold robes while colorful light from stained glass windows spills across the stone floor. As the camera reaches the altar area, it circles a raised platform draped in red fabric and flanked by figures in gray and green attire before turning away from the light. The scene then shifts toward the rear of the church, passing the final pews and a figure in brown robes near the exit. Finally, the camera ascends a set of stone stairs, where the warm glow of the cathedral fades into the deep shadows of an upper hallway.
